title: Elevate24 is coming to Auckland!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Big News for Auckland!

Our Elevate conferences have been a global success, and now we’re bringing the best of Elevate 24 straight to you in Auckland!

In case you missed it, Elevate is monday.com’s annual conference, built to give you everything you need to excel in all aspects of work. Join us in Auckland on November 20 to hear the highlights from the Elevate World Tour.

We hope you can join our team in Auckland for a day of learning, networking, and growth.

Ever thought about where else in the APJ region you’d love to see an Elevate conference land? Drop your dream conference destination below!

Let’s make work magic together. See you in Auckland!
